class.name: mowgli_hardware/MowgliSystemInterface
class.description: ros2_control SystemInterface for the Mowgli STM32 drive base. Owns the COBS/CRC16 serial link (embedding the HardwareBridgeNode comms core), exposes the two drive wheels as velocity-commanded joints, and inverts the firmware PWM deadband in a static feedforward. Pair with a chained pid_controller (per-wheel velocity loop) under a diff_drive_controller.
